solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_fix_has_required_import requires 'pointsEqual' in the import section. test_updateboundpoint_has_initial_arrow_guard requires the check to be inside the 'binding == null' condition block with 'arrow.points' and specific comparison patterns.
